hero.name: DANIEL MASEYA
hero.title: Building
hero.description: I craft high-performance applications and intuitive interfaces that transform ideas into powerful digital solutions.

about.title: Crafting Digital
about.description1: I'm a Full-Stack Engineer and UX Enthusiast passionate about turning complex challenges into intuitive, beautiful digital products. I enjoy bridging the gap between design thinking and robust backend infrastructure.
about.description2: My experience spans diverse domains, including fintech, mobility platforms, and critical healthcare systems. I am deeply committed to clarity, performance, and maximizing user impact in every project I undertake.
about.ctaDesc: Let's collaborate on innovative, scalable, and user-centered projects.

skills.title: Full-Stack Development
skills.description: I work across both engineering and design, moving seamlessly from high-level product thinking to detailed UI implementation.

projects.title: Selected
projects.description: A collection of my recent UX case studies and engineering projects that solve real-world problems.
projects.noProjects: No projects found in this category.

imas.title: IMAS — Intelligent Mobility Assistance System
imas.short: Mobility platform for improving ride experiences in Kinshasa.
imas.longDescription: IMAS helps passengers request rides, track vehicles, and review drivers. I led the product flow, wireframes, UI design, and built the React prototype that communicates with backend APIs.

savingdm.title: SavingDm (ex-CreditJambo)
savingdm.short: Savings & microcredit app with transactional features.
savingdm.longDescription: SavingDm manages user savings goals, transactions, and simple credit flows. I built the app logic, API integration, and the core data structures.

eyecare.title: Eye Care Management System
eyecare.short: Health system for patient management and eyewear orders.
eyecare.longDescription: A hospital system handling appointments, prescriptions, and eyewear inventory — built as a full product with role-based dashboards.

auca.title: AUCA English Professional Certificate
auca.short: University printing the certificate of English professional 1 & 2.
auca.longDescription: A certificate management system for AUCA English Professional levels 1 & 2; implemented backend workflows for certificate generation, database-driven validation using SQL Server and stored procedures, and a user-friendly UI for administrators to print and export official certificates.

cassie.title: Cassie Posh Events
cassie.short: Luxury wedding and event planning website for bookings and organization of marriages, birthdays, and parties.
cassie.longDescription: This is a sophisticated, modern website for Cassie Posh Events, LLC, a luxury wedding and event planning company based in Philadelphia, serving clients throughout the Tri-State area. The website embodies elegance, sophistication, and professionalism through its thoughtful design and user experience.

jeremie.title: Jeremy Nze's Portfolio
jeremie.short: Personal portfolio website showcasing projects and skills.
jeremie.longDescription: A modern, professional portfolio website built with React.js to showcase skills, experience, projects, and certifications. The portfolio features a clean, responsive design with smooth animations and a professional blue color scheme.

bisman.title: Maîtrisez les marchés avec la précision d'un institutionnel - BismanFX Académique
bisman.short: Académie de trading professionnelle. Des stratégies institutionnelles pour des résultats consistants.
bisman.role: Developer And Collaborator with Eng Ariel Aganze
bisman.longDescription: BismanFx Academy is a professional trading education platform founded by Matthieu Bisimwa, focused on institutional trading strategies (Smart Money Concepts) with structured training, live mentorship, and risk management guidance.

stayease.title: StayEase Africa – Apartment Booking Platform
stayease.short: A full-stack apartment booking platform designed for Africa, enabling users to discover, book, and manage apartments with real-time availability and role-based access.
stayease.longDescription: StayEase Africa is a full-stack web platform designed to simplify apartment discovery and booking across Africa. The system connects tenants, property owners, and administrators into a unified ecosystem.

apartment.title: A luxury Apartment Booking Platform for Africa
apartment.short: A Ui Ux Design and prototype for a luxury apartment booking platform tailored for the African market, addressing unique housing and payment challenges.
apartment.longDescription: A luxury apartment booking platform designed for the African market, addressing unique housing and payment challenges. The design focuses on a seamless user experience, allowing users to easily discover, book, and manage apartments.

salon.title: Nysha Hair Braiding – Salon Booking Platform
salon.short: Full-stack salon booking platform with online appointments, payments, and admin dashboard.
salon.longDescription: A complete salon management system for Nysha Hair Braiding, specializing in African braiding techniques. The platform allows customers to book appointments online, pay deposits via Stripe, and manage their reservations. Features include service catalog with pricing, working hours display, appointment management, payment processing, and an admin dashboard for salon owners to manage bookings and track revenue.

experience.title: Professional
experience.description: My journey through professional roles, internships, and major project contributions — organized as a clear timeline.
experience.downloadResume: Download my full resume or get in touch to discuss opportunities

bullets: Designed and implemented IMAS (mobility platform) UI and prototype; built React prototypes and coordinated API design.
Built core features for SavingDm (CreditJambo) including savings flows and transaction UI.
Collaborated with stakeholders to define product flows and converted Figma designs to production React components.

eyecare.role: Fullstack Developer — Eye Care Management System
bullets: Architected patient-doctor-admin modules and database schema.
Built responsive dashboards, appointment booking, and eyewear order tracking.
Implemented PDF export for registration and reports.
Designed stored-procedure-driven registration logic and role-based redirects.
Implemented Student/Teacher/Admin dashboards and PDF print of registration forms.
Worked on frontend features and bug fixes using React and Tailwind.
Participated in user testing and iterated UI based on feedback.

imas.summary: How I approached the UX for a mobility platform: mapping flows, defining personas, and turning real problems into clear interfaces.

eyecare.summary: What I learned about workflows, role-based dashboards, and patient-centered flows while designing a health system.

footer.description: Full-stack developer and UI/UX designer crafting beautiful, user-centered digital experiences across web and mobile platforms.
